title: Spears' Modpack
description: Every mod for perfect pvp and survival experience !
body:
# Spears' Modpack – Survival + PvP Enhanced

## 🎯 What is this pack?

This pack is built for players who want:

- Good PvP experience
- Smooth visuals  
- Useful survival improvements  
- Only necessary mods

##  Requirements

- Fabric Loader  
- Java 17+  

*(All libraries are included automatically – just install and play)*

##  Why this pack?

- **Optimized**
- **PvP-ready**
- **Nothing breaks vanilla logic**
- **Actively maintained**
  
Check out the more detailed information here


<details>
<summary>MODS</summary>


```markdown
PvP & Combat
- Combat Hitboxes
- Better Hitreg
- Optimal Aim
- Colored Crosshair
- Player Reach Display
- Shield Fixes
- Armor Hud

Visuals & Atmosphere
- Not Enough Animations
- Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]
- Dark Loading Screen
- ATMOSPHERICS
- Skyboxify
- View Model
- Item Scale
- Iris Shaders
- Animatium (Legacy Visuals Project)

Survival & Utility
- AppleSkin
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Map Tooltip
- Bobby
- Better Hidden Chat
- Axolotl Buckets
- Remove Reloading Screen
- FPS - Display
- Ping View
- Server Pinger Fixer
- Simple Voice Chat
- Zoomify

```


</details>

**If you want to know more about how this modpack was created, consider checking out my video down below (⌐■_■)**
